TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Slovakia kakilimaan u Slovakia sa i labu nu O-cuo, itiza i 48 40 N, 19 30 E. u ahebal nu lala' mapulung sa izaw ku 49,035 km2.u ahebal nu lala'ay sa izaw ku 48,105 km2, u ahebal nu nanumay sa izaw ku 930 km2. hamin nu tademawan sa 5,445,802. kakalukan umah sa 40.10%, kilakilangan umah sa 40.20%, zumaay henay umah sa 19.70%. nilacul tapang tusu nu kanatal u tapang tusu nu kanatal sa u Bratislava . kakinginan nu kanatal demiad kakinging nu kanatal demiad sa 1 bulad 9 demiad. tabakiay a tapang nu kanatal u tabakiay a tapang nu kanatal (congtung) ayza sa ci Zuzana ńĆaputov√° (SusannaÔľéCaputuwa ŤėáÁŹäŚ®ú¬∑śü•śôģśČėŚ®É), 1973 a mihca 6 a bulad 21 a demiad nalecuhan. u tabakiay a tapang nu kanatal (congtung) nu Slovakia ayza, micakat a demiad sa i 2019 a mihca 6 bulad 15 demiad. cunli u cunli nu Slovakia ayza sa ci Eduard Heger , micakat a demiad sa i 2021 a mihcaan 4 bulad 1 demiad. Czechoslovakia likisi Czechoslovakia i cacay a malebut siwa a lasubu cacay a bataan idaw ku walu (1918) a mihcaan katukuh i cacay a malebut siwa a lasubu siwa a bataan idaw ku tusa (1992) a mahcaan u O-cuo a kanatal, mabulesak satu tahekl ku tusaay misitekeday a kanatal ‚ÄĒ Czechia atu Czechoslovakia . Czechoslovakia patideng i cacay a malebut siwa a lasubu cacay a bataan idaw ku walu (1918) a mihcaan, itida i Cuo-o , u Czechia atu Slovakia misakaput, tawyaay a kanatal nu ngangan u Slovensko , itini i cacay katukuh tu tusaay a nikalepacawan, tawya namaka celcel henay tu saka kitakit nu saka pitu a tabakiay nu kakakulian. itini i saka tusa anikalepacawan, Czechoslovakia a niyadu hiyan nu Nacuy-Dekuo midebung, itin i kakakuliyana nu kakitidaan patideng tu Bohemia atu Moravia dadiputen a kanatal atu Czechoslovakia nu tusaay a dadadimawan nu kanatal, duma a niyaduan hiyan nu Poland atu Hungary amikelic. cacay a malebut siwa a lasubu enem a bataan (1960) a mihcaan,Czechoslovakia misumad tu ngangan u Czechoslovakia siakay cui kunhekuo. sumamadan a likisi Czechoslovakia a niyadu' itida i Ocuo nu teban, pisitekedan sa nuheni nama hiya nu Hapu-sepaw-wancaw patidenga tu Awtili-tikuo mikuwan makala tu tulu a pina (300) a lasubu ku tenes, cacay a malebut walu a lasubu enem a bataan idaw ku pitu (1867) a mihcaan Awtlli-tikuo misumad tu kaput mala Aw'cun-tikuo , Czechia atu Slovakia niyadu' mikelic sipabeli i Austria atu Hungary . cacay a malebut siwa a lasubu cacay a bataan idaw ku walu (1918) a mihcaan misatadas malepacaw tu hedek, Awcun-tikuo mademec mabulasak, Bohemia , Moravia , Slovakia a niyadu' misakaput misitekeday a kanatal, pangangan han u Czechoslovakia . misiteked satu kina kitakit, Czechoslovakia a sakaudip amelik satu mucelak, katukuh tu tusa anikalepacawan nu kanatal a ayawan, naytini i paykanatal nu saka cacay a bataan nu kakakulian a saka enem nu kasinganganan. cacay a malebut siwa a lasubu tulu a bataan idaw ku walu (1938) a mihcaan, Ing-fa a kanatal atu Germany atu Italy masasulit tu Munich a kiyakuan a sasulitan, itini kainaian nu Czechoslovakia dayhiw milihida tu kawaw panutek tu nutipanay a lala' Sudetenland kelicen sipabeli i Germany . 1939ŚĻī3śúą, . cacay a malebut siwa a lasubu tulu a bataan idaw ku siwa (1939) a mihcaan tulu a bulad, Nazi Germany maalatu Sudetenland aniyadu nu likucu, tahekal ku hitay hamin han ku Czechoslovakia mialaw, Germany itini i Czechia patideng tu Bohemia atu Moravia madiputay a kanatal, Slovakia mapatideng mahiya nu Germany madiputay a Czechoslovakia . Slovakia a niyadu' pakilac sipabeli i Germany a cabay tu Hungary wan-kuo . cacay a malebut siwa a lasubu sepat a bataan idaw ku lima (1945) a mihcaan, Su-lan pasayda i Dun-ou paculi, u Potsdam nika sasulitan tu Czechoslovakia namaka Prague nutipan hitay nu Amilika midebung, mapulung tu sudu Prague hiyan nu Su-lan a hitay madebung, Czechia atu Slovakia mapulung aca, kelican nu Germany atu Cun-yali ku lala' misabaluhayaca mibenis tu Czechoslovakia , nika Zakarpattia Oblast sipakelic i Soviet Union a Ukrainian Soviet Socialist Republic . cacay a malebut siwaw a lasubu sepat a bataan idaw ku enem (1946) a mihcaan lima a bulat, Czechoslovakia itini i United States Soviet Union miliyas satu salihalay satu kunuheni misingkiw, kuncendan sayadahay ku nisingkiwan a paya tulu a bataan idaw ku walu tin enem a kilac(-38.6%), amica kuncendan ku satabakiay nu dan nika micukelay a tademaw caay ka papina, nika mihantaya tu kuncendan a pinapinanu centan caay ka balud ku balucu'. sakatusa a mihcaan, Slovakia nuudip a kawaw caay henay ka hedaek,sakaudip kangelu' an macunus kunikacaay ka hulak nu kawaw nika itini i Stalin mipenec makai tunipipadan nu United States , nina kuncendan sifu caay kanamuhi nu tademaw kaisa miduiy itini i cacay a malebut siw a lasubut sepat a bataan idaw ku walu (1948) a mihcaan lima a bulad miliyawaca misingkiw. nika tawyaay a mihcaan nu tusa a bulad, kasaupu nu sifu a dumaan nu tan a sakakaay patahekal tu sapiales, midademec tu kuncendan misa tabaki tu kincal misilud tu kakawawen, sisa mapalekal ku cence kabaliyawan, kuncendan masakaputay miawaw tu katuuday muculil palekal miyukiw tina kawawan. imahini u sakakaay katepaan i dadan a mapatay, katuuday sakamusa cinida niuculan nu sifu mipacuk, mahida tuwaca kuncendan palekal mibabelih, unuheni mikuwan tu aydaay nipisingkiwan, amica ku cungli caay sipaliyuni nika sifu mamin tu u kuncendan kusi kawaway. nika itini i cacay a malebut siwa a lasubu sepat a bataan idaw ku walu (1948) a mihcaan tusa a bulad ninakawaw sa, mala Sulan a binawlan nu sehuw cui a kanatal, micumud tu Soviet Union patideng tu huasa sasulitan anikasakaput atu sakaudip papadang a wiyunhuw. 1960ŚĻī, . cacay a malebut siwa a lasubu enem a bataan (1960) a mihcaan Czechoslovakia misumad tu ngangan u Czechoslovak malabinawlanay a sakaputan nu kunhekuo . 1968ŚĻī, . cacay a malebut siwa a lasubu enem a bataan idaw kuwalu (1968) a mihcaan, tawyaay a Czechoslovakia kun-cen-dan sakacacaya a mikawaway ci Du'pu-cieke palekal tu " pulake a satingsingŚłÉśčČś†ľšĻčśė•" a sakaudip atu cence' misumada a laylayan, u Sulen caay ka namuh, Sulen midebung tu Slovakia milawlaw, pulake a satingsing namisumad tu laylay hatinitu sa, ciekun sakakaay ci Tupucieke' dakepen patayda i Moscow , Sulan a wayway kahiyaan nu kitakit sasakamuensa nu katuuday. 1989ŚĻī11śúą, . cacay a malebut siwa a lasubu walu a bataan idaw ku siwa (1989) a mihcaan cacay a bataan idaw ku cacay a bulad, Czechoslovakia milaheci ku Sezun a kawaw mahedek tu ku kuncen-dan misataaday a centan, cacay a malebut siwa a lasubu siwa a bataan (1990) a mihcaan, kanatal a ngangan misumad han u Czechia atu Slovakia lanpan-kunhe-kuo .

sa izaw ku **,*** km*, u ańß…ôbar~…ĺ nu nanumaj sa izaw ku *** km*. ńßamin nu tad…ômawan sa *,***,***. kakar~…ĺukan umańß sa **.**%, kir~…ĺakir~…ĺaŇčan umańß sa **.**%, zumaaj ńß…ônaj umańß sa **.**%. ¶…ôndan par~…ĺ…ôkar~…ĺ mibab…ôr~…ĺińß, unuńß…ôni mikuwan tu ajdaaj nipisiŇčkiwan, ami ¶a ku ¶uŇčr~…ĺi ¶aaj sipar~…ĺijuni nika sifu mamin tu u kun ¶…ôndan kusi kawawaj. nika itini i ¶a ¶aj a patid…ôŇč tu ńßuasa sasur~…ĺitan anikasakaput atu sakaudip papadaŇč a wijunńßuw. *****, . ¶a ¶aj a mar~…ĺ…ôbut siwa a r~…ĺasubu …ôn…ôm a bataan (****) a mińß ¶aan ¶z…ô ¶ńßosr~…ĺo*akia misumad tu ŇčaŇčan u ¶z…ô ¶ńßosr~…ĺo*ak mar~…ĺabinawr~…ĺanaj a sakaputan nu kunńß…ôkuo . *****, . ¶a ¶aj a mar~…ĺ…ôbut siwa a r~…ĺasubu …ôn…ôm a bataan idaw kuwar~…ĺu (****) a mińß ¶aan, tawjaaj a ¶z…ô ¶ńßosr~…ĺo*akia kun- ¶…ôn-dan saka ¶a ¶aja a mikawawaj ¶i du Ē~ °pu- ¶i…ôk…ô par~…ĺ…ôkar~…ĺ tu " pur~…ĺak…ô a satiŇčsiŇč*****" a sakaudip atu ¶…ôn ¶…ô Ē~ ° misumada a r~…ĺajr~…ĺajan, u sur~…ĺ…ôn ¶aaj ka namuńß, sur~…ĺ…ôn mid…ôbuŇč tu sr~…ĺo*akia mir~…ĺawr~…ĺaw, pur~…ĺak…ô a satiŇčsiŇč namisumad tu r~…ĺajr~…ĺaj ńßatinitu sa, ¶i…ôkun sakakaaj ¶i tupu ¶i…ôk…ô Ē~ ° dak…ôp…ôn patajda i mos ¶ow , sur~…ĺan a wajwaj kańßijaan nu kitakit sasakamu…ônsa nu katuudaj. ********, . ¶a ¶aj a mar~…ĺ…ôbut siwa a r~…ĺasubu war~…ĺu a bataan idaw ku siwa (****) a mińß ¶aan ¶a ¶aj a bataan idaw ku ¶a ¶aj a bur~…ĺad, ¶z…ô ¶ńßosr~…ĺo*akia mir~…ĺańß…ô ¶i ku s…ôzun a kawaw mańß…ôd…ôk tu ku kun ¶…ôn-dan misataadaj a ¶…ôntan, ¶a ¶aj a mar~…ĺ…ôbut siwa a r~…ĺasubu siwa a bataan (****) a mińß ¶aan, kanatar~…ĺ a ŇčaŇčan misumad ńßan u ¶z…ô ¶ńßia atu sr~…ĺo*akia r~…ĺanpan-kunńß…ô-kuo .
S.FORM: Slovakia kakilimaan u Slovakia sa i labu nu O-cuo, itiza i 48 40 N, 19 30 E. u ahebal nu lala' mapulung sa izaw ku 49,035 km2.u ahebal nu lala'ay sa izaw ku 48,105 km2, u ahebal nu nanumay sa izaw ku 930 km2. hamin nu tademawan sa 5,445,802. kakalukan umah sa 40.10%, kilakilangan umah sa 40.20%, zumaay henay umah sa 19.70%. nilacul tapang tusu nu kanatal u tapang tusu nu kanatal sa u Bratislava . kakinginan nu kanatal demiad kakinging nu kanatal demiad sa 1 bulad 9 demiad. tabakiay a tapang nu kanatal u tabakiay a tapang nu kanatal (congtung) ayza sa ci Zuzana ńĆaputov√° (SusannaÔľéCaputuwa ŤėáÁŹäŚ®ú¬∑śü•śôģśČėŚ®É), 1973 a mihca 6 a bulad 21 a demiad nalecuhan. u tabakiay a tapang nu kanatal (congtung) nu Slovakia ayza, micakat a demiad sa i 2019 a mihca 6 bulad 15 demiad. cunli u cunli nu Slovakia ayza sa ci Eduard Heger , micakat a demiad sa i 2021 a mihcaan 4 bulad 1 demiad. Czechoslovakia likisi Czechoslovakia i cacay a malebut siwa a lasubu cacay a bataan idaw ku walu (1918) a mihcaan katukuh i cacay a malebut siwa a lasubu siwa a bataan idaw ku tusa (1992) a mahcaan u O-cuo a kanatal, mabulesak satu tahekl ku tusaay misitekeday a kanatal ‚ÄĒ Czechia atu Czechoslovakia . Czechoslovakia patideng i cacay a malebut siwa a lasubu cacay a bataan idaw ku walu (1918) a mihcaan, itida i Cuo-o , u Czechia atu Slovakia misakaput, tawyaay a kanatal nu ngangan u Slovensko , itini i cacay katukuh tu tusaay a nikalepacawan, tawya namaka celcel henay tu saka kitakit nu saka pitu a tabakiay nu kakakulian. itini i saka tusa anikalepacawan, Czechoslovakia a niyadu hiyan nu Nacuy-Dekuo midebung, itin i kakakuliyana nu kakitidaan patideng tu Bohemia atu Moravia dadiputen a kanatal atu Czechoslovakia nu tusaay a dadadimawan nu kanatal, duma a niyaduan hiyan nu Poland atu Hungary amikelic. cacay a malebut siwa a lasubu enem a bataan (1960) a mihcaan,Czechoslovakia misumad tu ngangan u Czechoslovakia siakay cui kunhekuo. sumamadan a likisi Czechoslovakia a niyadu' itida i Ocuo nu teban, pisitekedan sa nuheni nama hiya nu Hapu-sepaw-wancaw patidenga tu Awtili-tikuo mikuwan makala tu tulu a pina (300) a lasubu ku tenes, cacay a malebut walu a lasubu enem a bataan idaw ku pitu (1867) a mihcaan Awtlli-tikuo misumad tu kaput mala Aw'cun-tikuo , Czechia atu Slovakia niyadu' mikelic sipabeli i Austria atu Hungary . cacay a malebut siwa a lasubu cacay a bataan idaw ku walu (1918) a mihcaan misatadas malepacaw tu hedek, Awcun-tikuo mademec mabulasak, Bohemia , Moravia , Slovakia a niyadu' misakaput misitekeday a kanatal, pangangan han u Czechoslovakia . misiteked satu kina kitakit, Czechoslovakia a sakaudip amelik satu mucelak, katukuh tu tusa anikalepacawan nu kanatal a ayawan, naytini i paykanatal nu saka cacay a bataan nu kakakulian a saka enem nu kasinganganan. cacay a malebut siwa a lasubu tulu a bataan idaw ku walu (1938) a mihcaan, Ing-fa a kanatal atu Germany atu Italy masasulit tu Munich a kiyakuan a sasulitan, itini kainaian nu Czechoslovakia dayhiw milihida tu kawaw panutek tu nutipanay a lala' Sudetenland kelicen sipabeli i Germany . 1939ŚĻī3śúą, . cacay a malebut siwa a lasubu tulu a bataan idaw ku siwa (1939) a mihcaan tulu a bulad, Nazi Germany maalatu Sudetenland aniyadu nu likucu, tahekal ku hitay hamin han ku Czechoslovakia mialaw, Germany itini i Czechia patideng tu Bohemia atu Moravia madiputay a kanatal, Slovakia mapatideng mahiya nu Germany madiputay a Czechoslovakia . Slovakia a niyadu' pakilac sipabeli i Germany a cabay tu Hungary wan-kuo . cacay a malebut siwa a lasubu sepat a bataan idaw ku lima (1945) a mihcaan, Su-lan pasayda i Dun-ou paculi, u Potsdam nika sasulitan tu Czechoslovakia namaka Prague nutipan hitay nu Amilika midebung, mapulung tu sudu Prague hiyan nu Su-lan a hitay madebung, Czechia atu Slovakia mapulung aca, kelican nu Germany atu Cun-yali ku lala' misabaluhayaca mibenis tu Czechoslovakia , nika Zakarpattia Oblast sipakelic i Soviet Union a Ukrainian Soviet Socialist Republic . cacay a malebut siwaw a lasubu sepat a bataan idaw ku enem (1946) a mihcaan lima a bulat, Czechoslovakia itini i United States Soviet Union miliyas satu salihalay satu kunuheni misingkiw, kuncendan sayadahay ku nisingkiwan a paya tulu a bataan idaw ku walu tin enem a kilac(-38.6%), amica kuncendan ku satabakiay nu dan nika micukelay a tademaw caay ka papina, nika mihantaya tu kuncendan a pinapinanu centan caay ka balud ku balucu'. sakatusa a mihcaan, Slovakia nuudip a kawaw caay henay ka hedaek,sakaudip kangelu' an macunus kunikacaay ka hulak nu kawaw nika itini i Stalin mipenec makai tunipipadan nu United States , nina kuncendan sifu caay kanamuhi nu tademaw kaisa miduiy itini i cacay a malebut siw a lasubut sepat a bataan idaw ku walu (1948) a mihcaan lima a bulad miliyawaca misingkiw. nika tawyaay a mihcaan nu tusa a bulad, kasaupu nu sifu a dumaan nu tan a sakakaay patahekal tu sapiales, midademec tu kuncendan misa tabaki tu kincal misilud tu kakawawen, sisa mapalekal ku cence kabaliyawan, kuncendan masakaputay miawaw tu katuuday muculil palekal miyukiw tina kawawan. imahini u sakakaay katepaan i dadan a mapatay, katuuday sakamusa cinida niuculan nu sifu mipacuk, mahida tuwaca kuncendan palekal mibabelih, unuheni mikuwan tu aydaay nipisingkiwan, amica ku cungli caay sipaliyuni nika sifu mamin tu u kuncendan kusi kawaway. nika itini i cacay a malebut siwa a lasubu sepat a bataan idaw ku walu (1948) a mihcaan tusa a bulad ninakawaw sa, mala Sulan a binawlan nu sehuw cui a kanatal, micumud tu Soviet Union patideng tu huasa sasulitan anikasakaput atu sakaudip papadang a wiyunhuw. 1960ŚĻī, . cacay a malebut siwa a lasubu enem a bataan (1960) a mihcaan Czechoslovakia misumad tu ngangan u Czechoslovak malabinawlanay a sakaputan nu kunhekuo . 1968ŚĻī, . cacay a malebut siwa a lasubu enem a bataan idaw kuwalu (1968) a mihcaan, tawyaay a Czechoslovakia kun-cen-dan sakacacaya a mikawaway ci Du'pu-cieke palekal tu " pulake a satingsingŚłÉśčČś†ľšĻčśė•" a sakaudip atu cence' misumada a laylayan, u Sulen caay ka namuh, Sulen midebung tu Slovakia milawlaw, pulake a satingsing namisumad tu laylay hatinitu sa, ciekun sakakaay ci Tupucieke' dakepen patayda i Moscow , Sulan a wayway kahiyaan nu kitakit sasakamuensa nu katuuday. 1989ŚĻī11śúą, . cacay a malebut siwa a lasubu walu a bataan idaw ku siwa (1989) a mihcaan cacay a bataan idaw ku cacay a bulad, Czechoslovakia milaheci ku Sezun a kawaw mahedek tu ku kuncen-dan misataaday a centan, cacay a malebut siwa a lasubu siwa a bataan (1990) a mihcaan, kanatal a ngangan misumad han u Czechia atu Slovakia lanpan-kunhe-kuo .
